next_recommended_step: human review of v0_38 safety checklist, then design a separate read-only broker facts audit only

required_future_demo_preflight_checks.blocking_condition: candidate id mismatch, rule mismatch, retune, threshold search, or parameter grid detected
required_future_demo_preflight_checks.required_confirmation: confirm v0_26 candidate id and fixed rules match committed v0_26 report exactly

required_future_demo_preflight_checks.blocking_condition: missing locked OOS marker, repeat review allowed, or any attempt to recreate OOS metrics
required_future_demo_preflight_checks.required_confirmation: confirm OOS was reviewed once only and repeat review remains disallowed

required_future_demo_preflight_checks.blocking_condition: any execution path, broker adapter, account connection, order function wrapper, or queue is present
required_future_demo_preflight_checks.required_confirmation: confirm no demo/live execution surface, broker path, account connection, order functions, or queue exists

required_future_demo_preflight_checks.blocking_condition: any directional instruction or recommendation-style trading output is present
required_future_demo_preflight_checks.required_confirmation: confirm outputs remain non-directional and contain no trading instructions or recommendations

required_future_demo_preflight_checks.blocking_condition: broker facts are missing, manually unverifiable, or would require execution code in this version
required_future_demo_preflight_checks.required_confirmation: define a future read-only broker facts audit covering symbol contract, digits, tick size, lot step, min/max lot, margin mode, session hours, swaps, commission, spread source, and slippage assumptions

required_future_demo_preflight_checks.blocking_condition: risk constraints are absent, ambiguous, or allow discretionary escalation
required_future_demo_preflight_checks.required_confirmation: define future human-approved risk constraints before any demo consideration: account type, max loss, max lots, one-position cap, emergency stop, and no averaging into loss

required_future_demo_preflight_checks.blocking_condition: approval token, approver, timestamp, or reviewed artifact list is missing
required_future_demo_preflight_checks.required_confirmation: require explicit human approval after reviewing this checklist and a separate future read-only facts audit
